propositions: There is no ongoing per-test performance signal in CI, so slow tests remain invisible until manually profiled.
Add --durations=25 to the default-suite pytest invocation in gerrit-verify.yaml and test.yml so each gate run prints its 25 slowest tests.
Optionally add a scheduled/post-merge step running pytest --store-durations --durations-path .test_durations and upload the durations file as an artifact for future pytest-split sharding.
The .test_durations file must be gitignored or artifact-only so it never leaks into the checkout or trips the repo-leak guard.
--durations is confirmed compatible with -q, coverage, and xdist.
